title: Should I Run the Triple Crown?!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The Classic Triple Crown is a huge opportunity
for racers in their classic year. Mejiro Palmer is
having trouble deciding whether to give it a try.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
She doesn't want to embarrass herself and
become a laughingstock. However, she has also
always dreamed of the Triple Crown and doesn't
want to skip it either.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
After much deliberation, we decide to check in on
how she feels before each Classic Triple Crown
race. If she feels like running, we'll enter the race.
